meaning: n.<美俚>争吵,喧闹的舞会(或宴会)
examples: The MLKDC's Terence Brannigan said the organisation already had "significant international interest" shown in developing the site.
Aidan Brannigan's 56th-minute goal cut 'Bridge's lead to two and Kilcoo hit four further late points to triumph.
